arts.ttl: Inter vs. Parma to kick off matchday 15
arts.sum: Henrikh Mkhitaryan has scored three goals against Parma in Serie A, his joint-most against an opponent (three goals also against Genoa and Inter); indeed, in both of his matches against the Gialloblù he has been involved in two goals (a brace in November 2020 and a goal plus an assist in July 2020). Inter have not won at home against Parma in Serie A since 21 April 2013 (D4 L1 since then); for the Nerazzurri this is their longest ongoing streak of home games without a win against an opponent in the competition.

arts.ttl: FIFA Club World Cup 25 draw LIVE: Countdown to the start of the draw
arts.sum: Good evening everybody and welcome to another MARCA in English live blog, this time taking you through the draw for the FIFA Club World Cup for 2025. The game will feature Lionel Messi's Inter Miami, but who they face will be decided on Thursday.
